positive: A central, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain range at sunrise. The foreground features minimal, stylized pine trees and crystalline river reflections. The style is highly graphic, inspired by art deco and clean linework, using a limited palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, teal, and cream. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes against a dramatic sky. The image should have distinct, flat color blocking and high contrast, perfect for a wearable print, viewed straight on from a slight overhead angle. Seamless repeat pattern suitability.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, low resolution, messy, grainy
